trigger_condition: kill() deferred while hidden returns Ok(()) with no retry
guard_snippet: Track deferred kills in a Vec and retry on set_hidden(false)
potential_consequence: Callers believe kill succeeded; terminal process leaks until app restart

trigger_condition: PTY data arrives before setRendererAttached(true) after connect
guard_snippet: Check ptyId against recently-connected set or defer transcript capture until attachmentCount settles
potential_consequence: Duplicate data in transcript + xterm buffer during startup restore window

trigger_condition: Rapid visibility toggles cause cascading broadcastVisibility re-broadcasts
guard_snippet: Guard with monotonic sequence counter to skip stale pending values
potential_consequence: Backend receives stale visibility state after rapid minimize/restore cycles

trigger_condition: Two concurrent syncVisibilityState calls race through isMinimized+applyVisibility
guard_snippet: Gate with a mutex-style ref so only one sync runs at a time
potential_consequence: applyAppHiddenState fires with stale visibility after rapid focus+document events

guard_snippet: Match by t.id instead of array index: prevState.terminals.find(p => p.id === t.id)
potential_consequence: Phantom structural changes detected after reorder, triggering spurious saves

trigger_condition: Every appendTranscript fires subscribe which runs serializeTerminalsForProject
guard_snippet: Skip serialization when only transcript changed: separate transcript-only flush path
potential_consequence: CPU-bound ANSI/OSC stripping + scrollback extraction runs on every PTY data event
